mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_LQ_USER_QUEST_PK.nextval FROM dual
INSERT INTO LQ_USER_QUEST ( user_quest_id, user_id, quest_id, status, started_at, due_at, completed_at, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userQuestId}, #{userId}, #{questId}, #{status}, #{startedAt}, #{dueAt}, #{completedAt}, sysdate )
mapper.select: SELECT USER_QUEST_ID, USER_ID, QUEST_ID, STATUS, STARTED_AT, DUE_AT, COMPLETED_AT, CREATED_AT FROM ( SELECT USER_QUEST_ID, USER_ID, QUEST_ID, STATUS, STARTED_AT, DUE_AT, COMPLETED_AT, CREATED_AT FROM LQ_USER_QUEST WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND QUEST_ID = #{questId} ORDER BY USER_QUEST_ID DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT uq.USER_QUEST_ID, uq.USER_ID, uq.QUEST_ID, uq.STATUS AS questStatus, uq.STARTED_AT, uq.DUE_AT, uq.COMPLETED_AT, uq.CREATED_AT, q.TITLE, q.DESCRIPTION, q.CATEGORY, q.REWARD_EXP, q.REWARD_POINT, q.TIME_LIMIT, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LQ_QUEST_LOCATION ql WHERE ql.QUEST_ID = uq.QUEST_ID ) AS totalLocationCount, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LQ_USER_QUEST_PROGRESS uqp WHERE uqp.USER_QUEST_ID = uq.USER_QUEST_ID AND NVL(uqp.IS_COMPLETED, 0) = 1 ) AS completedLocationCount, CASE WHEN ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LQ_QUEST_LOCATION ql WHERE ql.QUEST_ID = uq.QUEST_ID ) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LQ_USER_QUEST_PROGRESS uqp WHERE uqp.USER_QUEST_ID = uq.USER_QUEST_ID AND NVL(uqp.IS_COMPLETED, 0) = 1 ) * 100 / ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LQ_QUEST_LOCATION ql WHERE ql.QUEST_ID = uq.QUEST_ID )) END AS progressPercent FROM LQ_USER_QUEST uq INNER JOIN LQ_QUEST q ON uq.QUEST_ID = q.QUEST_ID WHERE uq.USER_ID = #{userId} AND uq.STATUS != 'ABANDONED' ORDER BY CASE WHEN uq.STATUS = 'IN_PROGRESS' THEN 1 WHEN uq.STATUS = 'SAVED' THEN 2 WHEN uq.STATUS = 'COMPLETED' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, NVL(uq.STARTED_AT, uq.CREATED_AT) DESC, uq.USER_QUEST_ID DESC

SELECT uq.USER_QUEST_ID, uq.USER_ID, uq.QUEST_ID, uq.STATUS AS questStatus, uq.STARTED_AT, uq.DUE_AT, uq.COMPLETED_AT, uq.CREATED_AT, q.TITLE, q.DESCRIPTION, q.CATEGORY, q.REWARD_EXP, q.REWARD_POINT, q.TIME_LIMIT, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LQ_QUEST_LOCATION ql WHERE ql.QUEST_ID = uq.QUEST_ID ) AS totalLocationCount, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LQ_USER_QUEST_PROGRESS uqp WHERE uqp.USER_QUEST_ID = uq.USER_QUEST_ID AND NVL(uqp.IS_COMPLETED, 0) = 1 ) AS completedLocationCount, CASE WHEN ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LQ_QUEST_LOCATION ql WHERE ql.QUEST_ID = uq.QUEST_ID ) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LQ_USER_QUEST_PROGRESS uqp WHERE uqp.USER_QUEST_ID = uq.USER_QUEST_ID AND NVL(uqp.IS_COMPLETED, 0) = 1 ) * 100 / ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LQ_QUEST_LOCATION ql WHERE ql.QUEST_ID = uq.QUEST_ID )) END AS progressPercent FROM LQ_USER_QUEST uq INNER JOIN LQ_QUEST q ON uq.QUEST_ID = q.QUEST_ID WHERE uq.USER_QUEST_ID = #{userQuestId}

SELECT uqp.USER_QUEST_PROGRESS_ID, ql.QUEST_LOCATION_ID, ql.LOCATION_ID, ql.VISIT_ORDER, l.NAME, l.ZIP_CODE, l.ADDRESS, l.ADDRESS_DETAIL, l.LATITUDE, l.LONGITUDE, l.LOCATION_TYPE, l.DESCRIPTION, NVL(uqp.IS_COMPLETED, 0) AS isCompleted, uqp.COMPLETED_AT FROM LQ_USER_QUEST uq INNER JOIN LQ_QUEST_LOCATION ql ON uq.QUEST_ID = ql.QUEST_ID INNER JOIN LQ_LOCATION l ON ql.LOCATION_ID = l.LOCATION_ID LEFT JOIN LQ_USER_QUEST_PROGRESS uqp ON uqp.USER_QUEST_ID = uq.USER_QUEST_ID AND uqp.QUEST_LOCATION_ID = ql.QUEST_LOCATION_ID WHERE uq.USER_QUEST_ID = #{userQuestId} ORDER BY ql.VISIT_ORDER ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LQ_QUEST_LOCATION WHERE QUEST_ID = ( SELECT QUEST_ID FROM LQ_USER_QUEST WHERE USER_QUEST_ID = #{userQuestId} )
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LQ_USER_QUEST_PROGRESS WHERE USER_QUEST_ID = #{userQuestId} AND NVL(IS_COMPLETED, 0) = 1
